title: centaurea × croatica
intro: Centaurea × croatica, also known as the Croatian knapweed, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Centaurea × croatica include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Centaurea × croatica can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of conditions, from wounds to digestive issues.
